prompt: Change la couleur du bouton principal du configurateur en rouge. Le bouton 'Commencer' sur configurateur.html doit passer de doré à rouge.

assertions.text: Plan includes committing and pushing to the master branch
Plan includes opening the page in Chrome to verify visually
Plan includes force-refreshing or hard-reloading the page
Plan starts by reading the source file before making changes
assertions.description: The plan should read configurateur.html before editing
